inputs.claim_text: CLAIM SUBMISSION. Policy: AU-2025-7893. Date of incident: 14 March 2025. Location: Junction of Maple Street and Oak Avenue, Munich. Description: Rear-end collision at traffic light. Claimant vehicle stopped at red light, struck from behind by third party. Damage: Rear bumper, trunk lid, and tail lights. Two independent repair estimates obtained: Estimate A: 4,200 EUR. Estimate B: 3,850 EUR. Police report filed (reference: MUC-2025-03-14-0442). Photographs of damage attached. No injuries reported.
